description: Bounded launch input passed to the lead instead of full state files.

personaRouteAudit.description: Bounded audit of next/dispatch-context persona requirements against the launched route lanes.

modelRoles.description: Resolved profile+route model-role dispatch policy snapshotted at launch.

warnings.description: Advisory launch issues that should be shown in prompts but do not block run creation.

rules: Startup packet generation must use bounded extraction for large state files.
Stale, closed, superseded, archived, missing priorities, route incompatibility, and blocking write-boundary issues stop launch before implementation dispatch.
Priority handoff drift is advisory: preserve it in warnings and launch the run so the lead can reconcile it before dispatching implementation.
The lead receives the packet, not full PRIORITIES.md or SESSION_LOG.md content.
Extraction commands and byte/line caps must be recorded.
Resolved model roles are launch facts; launched lanes and subagents must not silently substitute configured planning, builder, research, audit, or synthesis roles.
If personaRouteAudit reports missing required personas or packetized/not-executed persona work, the lead must reconcile route fit before dispatching implementation.
